introSection: Royal Scotsman is a steel roller coaster at Hansa-Park in Sierksdorf, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany. It is surrounded by Nessie.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride opened in 1993 as Rasender Roland. For the 2020 season, the ride was renamed Royal Scotsman to fit in to the newly redone 'Bezauberndes Britannien' area. The Royal Scotsman is a luxury train offering overnight journeys around the Scottish Highlands.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Blue track and supports. The ride opened with brown track and supports.

fullText:
Royal Scotsman is a steel roller coaster at Hansa-Park in Sierksdorf, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany. It is surrounded by Nessie.

The ride opened in 1993 as Rasender Roland. For the 2020 season, the ride was renamed Royal Scotsman to fit in to the newly redone 'Bezauberndes Britannien' area. The Royal Scotsman is a luxury train offering overnight journeys around the Scottish Highlands.



Blue track and supports. The ride opened with brown track and supports.
